faqs.question: How much does ant control cost in Travis, Staten Island?
faqs.answer: Ant control services in Travis typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and type of ant species. We provide free inspections and transparent pricing before beginning any treatment.

faqs.question: What types of ants are common in Travis?
faqs.answer: Travis homeowners most frequently encounter carpenter ants, pavement ants, odorous house ants, and occasionally pharaoh ants. Carpenter ants are particularly common due to the area's older wooden structures and proximity to wooded areas near the William T. Davis Wildlife Refuge.
